name: Cloudinary
description: Cloudinary is a cloud-based media management platform providing APIs for uploading, transforming, optimizing, and delivering images and videos at scale. The Admin API manages resources, folders, tags, transformations, upload presets, and metadata. The Upload API handles file uploads and transformations.

auth.note: Use HTTP Basic auth with api_key:api_secret. Cloud name is part of the URL path.

capabilities.name: upload_image
capabilities.description: Upload an image to Cloudinary from a URL, file, or base64 string with optional transformations.

capabilities.name: upload_video
capabilities.description: Upload a video to Cloudinary from a URL or file.

capabilities.name: upload_destroy
capabilities.description: Delete an asset by public ID via the Upload API.

capabilities.name: resources_list
capabilities.description: List assets in your Cloudinary account by resource type with pagination.

capabilities.name: resources_get
capabilities.description: Get detailed metadata for a specific asset by public ID.

capabilities.name: resources_update
capabilities.description: Update asset metadata, tags, context, or access mode.

capabilities.name: resources_delete
capabilities.description: Delete one or more assets by public IDs.

capabilities.name: resources_by_tag
capabilities.description: List assets with a specific tag.

capabilities.name: tags_list
capabilities.description: List all tags for a resource type.

capabilities.name: folders_list_root
capabilities.description: List all root folders in your media library.

capabilities.name: folders_list_sub
capabilities.description: List subfolders within a given folder path.

capabilities.name: folders_create
capabilities.description: Create a new folder in your media library.

capabilities.name: folders_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an empty folder.

capabilities.name: folders_rename
capabilities.description: Rename a folder.

capabilities.name: transformations_list
capabilities.description: List all stored transformations.

capabilities.name: transformations_create
capabilities.description: Create a named transformation.

capabilities.name: transformations_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a stored transformation.

capabilities.name: upload_presets_list
capabilities.description: List all upload presets.

capabilities.name: upload_presets_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific upload preset.

capabilities.name: upload_presets_create
capabilities.description: Create a new upload preset with predefined settings.

capabilities.name: upload_presets_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing upload preset.

capabilities.name: upload_presets_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an upload preset.

capabilities.name: usage_get
capabilities.description: Get account usage statistics: storage, bandwidth, transformations, requests.

capabilities.name: ping
capabilities.description: Test reachability of the Cloudinary API.

capabilities.name: metadata_fields_list
capabilities.description: List all structured metadata field definitions.

capabilities.name: metadata_fields_create
capabilities.description: Create a new structured metadata field definition.

capabilities.name: metadata_fields_update
capabilities.description: Update a metadata field definition.

capabilities.name: metadata_fields_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a metadata field definition.
